name: Burgess
description: Burgess, a strong warrior. They are very strong, and well trained in all manner of close combat. They have high defense and stamina, and are very well suited to feats of strength. They are also somewhat nimble, but lack the ability for major acrobatic movements. However, they have a complete and utter lack of magic, being completely incapable under any circumstances to cast even the simplest of spells. They can still use potions and magical items, but cannot cast any magic on their own at all. They have 25 hit points total. They start with sturdy chainmail armor, a battleaxe, and brass knuckles.
blurb: Burgess - a powerful warrior with a strong constitution. They have no magical talent, but make up for it with overwhelming strength and a large health pool.

SkillNameExample1.name: Absolute Unit
SkillNameExample1.description: Your years of training and weightlifting have left you incredibly swole.

modifier.modify: Increased damage on melee attacks. You can lift up to 300kg in weight.

SkillNameExample2.name: Blazing Fist
SkillNameExample2.description: Your ultimate move: punch so hard you set things on fire

modifier.trigger: active skill: ask player to use it by your judgement
modifier.modify: Anything hit with the Blazing Fist is burned and set on fire.

ItemNameExample1.name: Battleaxe
ItemNameExample1.description: Your battleaxe. You have trained with it so much it's practically a part of you.

ItemNameExample2.name: Brass Knuckles
ItemNameExample2.description: Your trusty brass knuckles. Technically made of bronze.
ItemNameExample2.modify: Adds slight armor piercing to punches
